caption: The video appears to be an introduction or segment from "The Tiger Technicians Hour," which aired on June 8th, 2022. The focus is on a book titled "Fibonacci 24/7" by Larry Pesavento, as indicated by the prominent display of the book cover against a vibrant green background with swirling patterns and bubbles. The text "FIBONACCI 24/7" is also displayed prominently below the book cover, emphasizing the subject matter. The presenter or host of this segment is Basil Chapman, whose name is shown at the bottom of the screen. The overall aesthetic suggests a professional yet engaging presentation, likely aimed at discussing financial trading techniques using Fibonacci principles.
